description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, envelope-style design with a prominent flap closure on the front. The exterior is covered in a woven or printed geometric pattern, primarily consisting of interlocking diamond shapes in shades of gray, black, and beige. A thin strap or loop, likely made of leather or faux leather, is visible on the front, serving as part of the closure mechanism. The bag appears slim and compact, suitable for carrying small personal items. The surface texture looks slightly rough, suggesting a textile or fabric material, possibly with a subtle grain. There are no visible brand logos, metallic hardware, or additional decorative elements.
description: A slim, rectangular envelope-style handbag with a geometric diamond pattern in gray, black, and beige, featuring a flap closure and a thin front strap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flap closure with a thin strap and the full geometric diamond pattern.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the handbag's slim profile and the thickness of the material.
description_view_2: Back view displays the continuous geometric pattern without any visible closures or straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness and the edge of the flap closure.
attribute_strap_type: One short, thin loop or strap on the front, non-adjustable, likely for closure rather than carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure with a thin strap or loop on the front, likely secured by tucking or looping.
attribute_pattern: Geometric diamond pattern in gray, black, and beige.
